@DATASET dense_high_utility
@COMMENT Dense dataset (60% density), medium (100 trans), high min utility
@COMMENT Good for: Testing CP advantage (high minUtil, few patterns)
@COMMENT Expected: Very few HUIs (5-20), very few UPIs (2-10)
